---
title: "Meghana Murthy"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/meghana-v-murthy/
    - text: "{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/55megh
    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
      href: mailto:mvmeghana9@gmail.com
---

I'm a Master's student in **Business Analytics at DCU**, passionate about 
turning data into meaningful insights.

I enjoy working with Python, data visualisation, and building analytical 
solutions to real-world problems.

> "Data is the new oil — but only if you know how to refine it."

Feel free to explore my [projects](projects/index.qmd), read my 
[reflections](reflection.qmd), or [get in touch](contact.qmd)!
